ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., ETS, ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock price entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecasting model */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the stock price */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was made */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the model used to make the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accuracy_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy metric */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the accuracy metric (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the accuracy metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the accuracy metric was calculated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accuracy_metrics_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accuracy_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, trader) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., stock_price, prediction) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecasting model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was calculated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was calculated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the model used for the performance calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecasting model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes or improvements in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)
